questionHtml:
A ball of mass m is thrown with an initial speed of u at an angle θ to the horizontal as shown. Q is the highest point of the motion. Air resistance is negligible.

                                               

What is the momentum of the ball at Q?

A.     zero

B.     mu cosθ

C.     mu

D.     mu sinθ
